/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/qr_rubiks_cube.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/qr_rubiks_cube.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qr_rubiks_cube.dir/src/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qr_rubiks_cube.dir/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qr_rubiks_cube.dir/src/CubieMeshGenerator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qr_rubiks_cube.dir/src/RubiksCube.cpp.o CMakeFiles/qr_rubiks_cube.dir/src/InputController.cpp.o -o qr_rubiks_cube  /usr/lib/libglfw.so.3.4 libglad.a /usr/lib/libglm.a -ldl
